title: Start sharing workspaces as templates!
excerpt: Hey guys, I’ve got a feeling some of you will LOVE this! So first, nice to meet y’all, I’m Yadin from monday.com and I’d like for you to meet our new product - monday Spaces - with which you can share your workspaces as …

posts.author: yadinkatz (Yadin Katz)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey guys, I’ve got a feeling some of you will LOVE this! So first, nice to meet y’all, I’m Yadin from monday.com and I’d like for you to meet our new product - monday Spaces - with which you can share your workspaces as templates for the benefits of others in the user template community! If you’d like to be one of the firsts to get access - register now, it’s free I’m always available for any question. Want to share your workspace with our community? Sign up!

posts.author: Abbie.Navickas (Abbie)
posts.cookedHtml: I am excited to see how others utilize Monday.com for their projects.

posts.author: PeterHiebert99 (Peter Hiebert)
posts.cookedHtml:
This extremely cool!

Does this also mean that creators will be able to sell Monday.com templates like Notion templates?

posts.author: yadinkatz (Yadin Katz)
posts.cookedHtml: You can already check it out! Log in to www.mondayspaces.com and take a stroll

posts.author: yadinkatz (Yadin Katz)
posts.cookedHtml: We’re working on that!

posts.author: Lea7 (Lea)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Yadin! That is great news! Quick question - would this mean we would be able to save workspaces as templates for internal use (as we can do with boards now)?
Many thanks in advance

posts.author: yadinkatz (Yadin Katz)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Lea, yes most definitely

posts.author: Lea7 (Lea)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Yadin!
Hope all is well!
Could you let me know if the ability to set workspaces as favorites is now available in existing monday.com accounts? I cannot see it
Thank you in advance!

posts.author: ash22 (Ashli Mason)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Yadin!
Thank you for this amazing article and information.
Do you have any additional updates on if teams will be able to sell monday.com workspace templates through this new system?

I’ve looked everywhere and couldn’t find any info on this.

Thank you!

posts.author: GoodWork (Lisa Marshall)
posts.cookedHtml: @yadinkatz I completed the sign up form about a week ago but have not heard back. Is there someone I can follow up with?

posts.author: floraevista (Flora eVista)
posts.cookedHtml: Still I don’t know why Notion don’t adding custom colors. They are just fixed on 10 colors schemes. That’s why I have to use third party website tool to generate notion custom colors

posts.author: GoodWork (Lisa Marshall)
posts.cookedHtml: @yadinkatz hello! any updates on when monday Spaces will have a “only those with the link” access option?

posts.author: YuvrajSingh (Yuvraj Singh Rajput)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @yadinkatz, I have a quick question, will the templates be available in the monday.com template center as well?
